title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MobiKwik - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MobiKwik - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at MobiKwik are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MobiKwik:
MobiKwik is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MobiKwik!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
